SCENARIO_DESCRIPTION: Registered user succeeds login using provided valid email and password

SCENARIO_TITLE: Failed login attempt with invalid credentials
SCENARIO_DESCRIPTION: User attempts to login with invalid email and password and authentication is failed
EXPECTED_OUTCOME: Error message is displayed and user remains on the login page

SCENARIO_TITLE: Login form validation messages are displayed correctly
SCENARIO_DESCRIPTION: User submits login form with invalid input format and client-side validation is triggered
EXPECTED_OUTCOME: Validation messages are displayed and login is prevented

SCENARIO_TITLE: Authenticated user remains logged in until logout
SCENARIO_DESCRIPTION: User logs in successfully, navigates through the application or refreshes the page, and does not explicitly log out
EXPECTED_OUTCOME: User remains authenticated and stays logged until the Logout action is performed.

SCENARIO_TITLE: Authenticated session ends only after explicit logout
SCENARIO_DESCRIPTION: User logs in successfully and then clicks the Logout button
EXPECTED_OUTCOME: User session is terminated only after logout and protected pages are no longer accessible without re-authentication
